# SVRM

> Luxury lifestyle management in Cape Town — curated tours, chauffeured transport, and accommodation, arranged end-to-end.

SVRM is a Cape Town–based concierge and lifestyle management service. We arrange travel, stays, experiences, and bespoke requests for private clients and businesses across South Africa.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Overview of SVRM's curated lifestyle services.
- [Travel](/travel): Chauffeuring, private jets, and car rentals.
- [Lifestyle](/lifestyle): Yacht charters and on-water experiences.
- [Stays](/stays): Luxury villas, residences, and accommodation.
- [Tours](/tours): Safari, hunting, cultural, and adventure tours.
- [Tour Builder](/tours/builder): Design a custom tour with indicative pricing.
- [Custom Experiences](/experiences): Private chefs, cleaners, and bespoke requests.
- [Blog](/blog): SVRM journal — Cape Town and South African travel notes.
- [Contact](/contact): Enquire via form or WhatsApp.
